results.title: Toy Story
results.why_similar: It features toys coming to life and overcoming their rivalry through teamwork and creativity to save their owner, similar to the collaborative, imaginative spirit of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: The Super Mario Bros. Movie
results.why_similar: An ordinary character is thrust into a vibrant, rules-bending world where he must believe in himself and team up with others to save the day, mirroring the underdog and collaborative themes of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: The Sword in the Stone
results.why_similar: It follows a young, underestimated boy who is mentored through creative and unconventional lessons to unlock his potential, similar to Emmet's journey of self-discovery guided by more experienced builders.

results.title: The Dragon Prince
results.why_similar: It centers on an unlikely team from opposing sides overcoming ancient fears and building trust on a quest, reflecting the core message of unity and cooperation against a divided world found in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: The Incredibles
results.why_similar: A family of superheroes must combine their unique, individual talents and work as a team to defeat a villain, paralleling the 'team of specialists' and collaborative problem-solving in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Meet the Robinsons
results.why_similar: It follows a young, creative inventor who learns the importance of perseverance, family, and an optimistic forward-looking mindset, echoing the themes of creativity, failure, and hope in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Next Gen
results.why_similar: A lonely outcast and a rebellious robot form a friendship and use technology creatively to fight a corporate threat, similar to the bond between Emmet and Wyldstyle and the theme of individuality vs. conformity.

results.title: Paddington 2
results.why_similar: An eternally optimistic and kind-hearted character inspires his diverse community to work together creatively to overcome injustice, mirroring the themes of positivity, community, and collaborative problem-solving in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Go! Go! Cory Carson
results.why_similar: A cheerful, positive protagonist navigates everyday adventures and learns about friendship and overcoming small fears, reflecting the upbeat, can-do attitude and simple collaborative lessons at the heart of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Klaus
results.why_similar: It shares a theme of an ordinary, cynical person discovering the power of creativity and kindness to transform a community, much like Emmet in The LEGO Movie.

results.director: Jack Kinney, Clyde Geronimi, James Algar
results.title: The Adventures of Ichabod and Mr. Toad
results.why_similar: It features imaginative, larger-than-life characters whose obsessions lead them on wild adventures, echoing the boundless, rule-breaking creativity of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Wreck-It Ralph
results.why_similar: It follows a character tired of his prescribed role who ventures into other worlds to prove his worth, similar to Emmet breaking free from his instructions to become the Special.

results.title: Big Hero 6
results.why_similar: A team of unlikely heroes uses creativity, technology, and teamwork to fight a villain, mirroring the inventive, build-anything spirit and ensemble heroics of The LEGO Movie.

results.title: The Brave Little Toaster
results.why_similar: A group of ordinary objects embarks on a perilous, heartfelt quest to reunite with their owner, reflecting the theme of loyalty and the hidden potential in everyday things central to The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
results.why_similar: A self-centered hero learns to value friendship and teamwork over solo glory, similar to how The LEGO Movie's Batman learns to be part of a team.

results.title: The Mitchells vs. The Machines
results.why_similar: It celebrates chaotic creativity, individuality, and a dysfunctional family learning to work together, mirroring the inventive animation style and theme of embracing one's unique talents found in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Onward
results.why_similar: It shares a theme of an ordinary protagonist embarking on an extraordinary, imaginative quest that blends the mundane with the magical.

results.title: Trolls
results.why_similar: It centers on an relentlessly optimistic hero who uses creativity, music, and friendship to overcome challenges in a brightly colored world.

results.title: The Magician's Elephant
results.why_similar: It follows an ordinary boy on an impossible, imaginative quest that challenges the rules of his world and requires belief in the extraordinary.

results.title: Monsters, Inc.
results.why_similar: It features a duo of mismatched partners in a highly imaginative world who undergo a transformative journey that changes their entire society's perspective.

results.title: The Sea Beast
results.why_similar: It involves a naive but passionate character who joins a legendary adventurer, challenging established myths and forging a new, more truthful narrative.

results.title: Cars
results.why_similar: A self-centered protagonist learns humility and the value of community, mirroring the journey of Emmet in The LEGO Movie who learns he's more than just an ordinary guy.

results.title: Up
results.why_similar: It centers on an unlikely duo embarking on a grand, imaginative adventure, paralleling the partnership between Emmet and Wyldstyle in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Lilo & Stitch
results.why_similar: It focuses on a misfit finding a place to belong and forming a unique family, similar to how Emmet finds his purpose and builds a team in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Finding Nemo
results.why_similar: A cautious parent embarks on a vast, perilous journey, forming an unlikely team to save his child, echoing the epic quest and team-building in The LEGO Movie.

results.director: Sarah Smith, Jean-Philippe Vine, Octavio E. Rodriguez
results.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
results.why_similar: A boy and his defective robot friend challenge a conformist, corporate-controlled world, similar to The LEGO Movie's themes of creativity versus rigid order.

results.title: Moana
results.why_similar: An ordinary person discovers an extraordinary destiny and teams up with a flawed, legendary figure on a quest, much like Emmet's journey with Vitruvius in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Zootopia
results.why_similar: An optimistic underdog teams up with a cynical partner to solve a mystery and prove themselves, mirroring the dynamic and themes of belief in The LEGO Movie.

results.title: A Bug's Life
results.why_similar: An inventive misfit recruits a ragtag team of performers to stand up against oppressive bullies, celebrating the underdog and teamwork like The LEGO Movie.

results.title: Over the Moon
results.why_similar: A determined protagonist uses boundless creativity and assembles a quirky team to achieve an impossible goal, similar to the imaginative, build-anything spirit of The LEGO Movie.
